zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice De Ireby於1362年出生在英國藍卡爾易比時，她的父親John Gibson II26歲，母親Elizabeth Ramgay22歲。她於1389年之前與John Metcalfe結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年5月2日在英國越可爾阿斯可利格享年105歲，埋葬在英國越可爾阿斯可利格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice De Ireby于1362年出生在英国藍卡爾易比时，她的父亲John Gibson II26岁，母亲Elizabeth Ramgay22岁。她于1389年之前与John Metcalfe结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1467年5月2日在英国越可爾阿斯可利格享年105岁，埋葬在英国越可爾阿斯可利格。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ireby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Irby in Lincolnshire, Cheshire, and North Yorkshire, or Ireby (Cumberland and Lancashire), all named from Old Norse Írabýr ‘settlement of the Irish’. Compare Ireton .

variants.name: Ireton
meanings: English: most probably a habitational name from Kirk Ireton (Derbyshire) or perhaps from Ireton Farm in Weston Underwood (Derbyshire), both named in Anglo-Scandinavian as Íratūn ‘settlement of the Irish’ or more likely ‘settlement of the Irishman’. The reference may be either to a Scandinavian Viking who had been in Ireland or to an Irishman who came to England with the Vikings. Occasionally the name may also derive from either of two places called Irton in North Yorkshire, of which Irton in Seamer parish is a more likely source than the lost Irton in Coxwold. Both the North Yorkshire places have the same etymologies as those above.

variants.name: Erby
meanings: English: variant of   Irby  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice De Ireby was born in 1362, in Ireby, Lancashire, England, her father, John Gibson II, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Ramgay, was 22. She married John Metcalfe before 1389. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 2 May 1467, in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 105, and was buried in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice De Ireby est née en 1362, à Ireby, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Gibson II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ramgay, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Metcalfe avant 1389. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 mai 1467, à Askrigg, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 105 ans, et a été enterrée à Askrigg, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice De Ireby 1362 in Ireby, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Gibson II 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Ramgay 22. Sie hat vor 1389 John Metcalfe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Mai 1467 im Alter von 105 Jahren in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice De Ireby è nata il nel 1362 nel Ireby, Lancashire, England, sua padre, John Gibson II, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Ramgay, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Metcalfe prima del 1389. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 maggio 1467, nel Askrigg, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 105 anni, e fu sepolta a Askrigg, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice De Irebyが1362年にイギリスランカシュアイアアイレビーで生まれた時，父John Gibson IIは26歳，母Elizabeth Ramgayは22歳であった。1389年以前にJohn Metcalfeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年5月2日にイギリスヨークシュアイアアスクリググで105歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアアスクリググにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice De Ireby(이)가 1362년 영국 랭카실르 이레비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Gibson II(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Ramgay(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1389년 이전 John Metcalfe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 5월 2일 영국 요르크실르 아스크리그에서 105세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 아스크리그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice De Ireby nasceu em 1362, em Ireby, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Gibson II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Ramgay, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Metcalfe antes 1389. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de maio de 1467, em Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 105 anos, e foi sepultada em Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice De Ireby родилась в 1362 г. в местности иреби, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Gibson II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ramgay, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Metcalfe перед 1389 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 мая 1467 г. в местности аскриг, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 105 лет и была похоронена в местности аскриг, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice De Ireby nació en 1362, en Ireby, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Gibson II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Ramgay, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Metcalfe antes de 1389. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1467, en Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 105 años, y fue sepultada en Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
